info.name: AssistantEngineer Engineering Core V1
info.description: Engineering Core V1 status and diagnostics catalog endpoints. ClosedV1 means engineering formula gates are closed with documented limitations; it does not claim exact EnergyPlus, StandardReference or ASHRAE 140 equivalence.

request.description: Returns ClosedV1 status, formula gates, annual 8760 requirements, explicit non-claims, out-of-scope v1 items, planned validation and documentation files.

item.name: Get Engineering Core V1 diagnostics catalog

request.description: Returns Error/Warning/Info rules and user-facing diagnostics with code, severity, category, userMessage, userAction and closedV1Gate.
